news.title: Broadcom, Micron and ARM sink, leading chip stocks lower
news.summary: U.S. chipmakers plunged after Broadcom earnings disappointed investors. Broadcom is a major supplier of chips to Apple, Samsung and other companies.

news.title: Blackstone restricts flagship fund withdrawals as private asset fears reemerge
news.summary: Blackstone capped withdrawals from its $79 billion BCRED fund after redemption requests rose from 7.9% to 10%. The move adds to private market liquidity concerns.

news.title: As the largest World Cup ever kicks off, health officials are focused on more than Ebola
news.summary: Officials are more concerned about highly contagious diseases like measles and respiratory viruses. Those diseases can spread quickly through large, fast-moving crowds, officials say.

news.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
news.summary: Traders can speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares. Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on a company's value.

news.title: Ex-Trump advisor John Bolton agrees to plead guilty to retaining classified information: MS NOW
news.summary: Bolton said he was innocent and that he was being targeted because of his public opposition to President Trump. When he was indicted, John Bolton said he wasn't guilty of any crime.

news.title: Quantinuum’s stock set to pop after IPO as Wall Street buys into the quantum boom
news.summary: Quantinuum could be valued north of $18 billion given indications for an opening price of about $71. Quantinuum was founded in 2007 by a group of scientists from the University of Washington.

news.title: The Fed can’t protect consumers from supply shocks and price gouging — but Congress can
news.summary: Lawmakers need to take a stand on rising gas and grocery prices, says CNN's John Sutter. Sutter: Congress needs to pass a bill to raise the minimum wage to $15.

news.title: Gas prices could go even higher this summer due to this quiet shift at U.S. refineries
news.summary: $5-a-gallon gas could be here by July or August because of what is going on at refineries, one expert said.

news.title: You’re going to pay tax on RMDs — there’s no way around it. Or is there?
news.summary: A new playbook is needed to protect your retirement cash. Here’s your new playbook to protect you retirement cash, according to a new book.

news.title: Coal stocks climb as Trump shovels $700 million to the sector
news.summary: President Donald Trump is expected to talk about his new effort to boost coal power plants and coal exports at around 3 p.m. Eastern time.
